name: Hey, listen!
author: Codex
description: Shows clickable native game speech-bubble callouts in multiplayer combat when you or a teammate currently hold helpful setup effects like Vulnerable, Strength, Vigor, or Weak. Uses audited card detection to avoid cards that only mention a status. Includes game-language translation packs, colored upgraded-status text, and ModConfig settings for language, playable-only filtering, support callouts, and the callout timer.
